alias_audit.conclusion: Independent audit passed: the v1 gene-symbol normalisation (uppercase + non-alphanumeric strip) is internally consistent. Every pair of records sharing the same translated-protein hash or the same full-RNA hash is assigned to the same family, so any alias spelling differences are covered by the protein/RNA union keys and do not cause family-assignment failures.
